Compilation

  • gulp-compassstars177 - Sass → CSS with Ruby Sass & Compass.
  • gulp-lessstars566 - Lessstars16.6k → CSS.
  • gulp-stylusstars224 - Stylusstars10.7k → CSS.
  • gulp-postcssstars752 - Pipe CSS through PostCSSstars24.5k processors with a single parse.
  • gulp-coffeestars225 - Coffeescriptstars15.9k → JavaScript.
  • gulp-typescriptstars757 - TypeScriptstars70.7k → JavaScript.
  • gulp-reactstars239 - Facebook Reactstars168.1k JSX templates → JavaScript.
  • webpack-streamstars1.4k - Run webpackstars58.2k as a stream to conveniently integrate with gulp.

Transpilation

  • gulp-babelstars1.3k - ES6 → ES5 with babelstars39k.

  • gulp-es6-transpilerstars47 - [] ES6 → ES5 with es6-transpilerstars217.
  • gulp-mythstars40 - Mythstars4.4k - a polyfill for future versions of the CSS spec.
  • gulp-cssnextstars53 - [] Use tomorrow's CSS syntax, today, using cssnextstars5.4k.

Concatenation

  • gulp-concatstars787 - Concatenate files.

Minification

  • gulp-clean-cssstars636 - Minify CSS with clean-cssstars3.7k.
  • gulp-cssostars243 - Minify CSS with CSSOstars3.3k.
  • gulp-uglifystars1.2k - Minify JavaScript with UglifyJS2stars11.4k.
  • gulp-htmlminstars718 - Minify HTML with html-minifierstars4.4k.
  • gulp-imageminstars1.8k - Minify PNG, JPEG, GIF and SVG images with imageminstars4.7k.
  • gulp-svgminstars340 - Minify SVG files with gulp.

Optimization

  • gulp-uncssstars966 - Remove unused CSS selectors with UnCSSstars9.1k.
  • gulp-css-base64stars67 - Transform all resources found (those within a url() declaration) in CSS files into base64-encoded data URI strings.
  • gulp-svg2pngstars56 - Convert SVGs to PNGs.
  • gulp-responsivestars511 - Generate images at different sizes.
  • gulp-svgstorestars641 - Combine svg files into one with <symbol> elements.
  • gulp-iconfontstars810 - Create icon fonts from several SVG icons.

Injecting Assets

  • gulp-userefstars721 - Parse build blocks in HTML files to replace references to non-optimized scripts or stylesheets.
  • gulp-injectstars809 - Transform each file to a string and inject each transformed string into placeholders in the target stream files.
  • wiredepstars1.2k - Wire Bower dependencies to your source code.

  • gulp-templatestars278 - Lodashstars49.3k templates → JavaScript.
  • gulp-swigstars69 - Swigstars3.1k templates → HTML.
  • gulp-remarkstars10 - Gulp plugin for remarkstars4.1k - markdown processor powered by plugins

Linting

  • gulp-csslint - Automated linting of CSS with CSSLintstars4.6k.
  • gulp-htmlhintstars82 - HTMLHintstars2.6k wrapper to validate your HTML.
  • gulp-jshintstars427 - Detect errors and potential problems in JavaScript with JSHintstars8.6k.

  • gulp-coffeelintstars55 - A style checker that helps keep CoffeeScriptstars15.9k code clean.
  • gulp-tslintstars124 - TypeScriptstars70.7k linter plugin for gulp.

  • gulp-w3cjsstars56 - Validate HTML with w3cjsstars157.
  • gulp-lesshintstars13 - Lint less files with lesshintstars119.
  • gulp-check-unused-cssstars367 - Check your HTML templates for unused CSS classes.

Live Reload

  • browser-syncstars11.4k - Keep multiple browsers & devices in sync when building websites (recipesstars388).
  • gulp-livereloadstars780 - Gulp plugin for livereload.

Caching

  • gulp-changedstars737 - Only pass through changed files.
  • gulp-cachedstars448 - A simple in-memory file cache.
  • gulp-rememberstars150 - Remember and recall files passed through it.
  • gulp-newerstars229 - Pass through newer source files only.

Flow Control

  • merge-streamstars194 - Merge multiple streams into one interleaved stream.
  • streamqueuestars65 - Pipe queued streams progressively.
  • run-sequencestars981 - Run a series of dependent gulp tasks in order.
  • gulp-ifstars652 - Conditionally run a task.

Logging

  • gulp-notifystars596 - Notification plugin for gulp.
  • gulp-sizestars227 - Display the size of your project.
  • gulp-debugstars225 - Debug vinyl file streams to see what files are run through your gulp pipeline.
  • gulp-beerstars12 - Better Error Reporting with interactive system notifications and custom server for error displaying.

Testing

  • gulp-mochastars375 - Run Mochastars20.5k tests.
  • gulp-jasminestars111 - Run Jasmine 2stars15.1k tests in Node.js.
  • gulp-protractorstars136 - Gulp wrapper for Protractorstars8.7k tests.
  • gulp-coveragestars62 - Coverage reporting for Node.js that is independent of the test runner.
  • gulp-karmastars316 - Karma test runner for gulp.
  • gulp-avastars57- Run AVAstars19k tests with gulp.

Miscellaneous Plugins

  • gulp-utilstars841 - Set of useful utilities.
  • gulp-plumberstars811 - Prevent pipe breaking caused by errors.
  • gulp-load-pluginsstars764 - Automatically load in gulp plugins.

  • gulp-sourcemapsstars1.1k - Provide source map support.
  • gulp-replacestars480 - A string replace plugin for gulp.
  • gulp-renamestars677 - Rename files easily.
  • gulp-revstars1.5k - Static asset revisioning by appending content hash to filenames: unicorn.css → unicorn-d41d8cd98f.css.
  • delstars1.2k - Delete files/folders using globs.
  • gulp-execstars161 - Run a shell command.
  • gulp-strip-debugstars243 - Strip console, alert, and debugger statements from JavaScript code.
  • gulp-cssimportstars34 - Parses a CSS file, finds imports, grabs the content of the linked file and replaces the import statement with it.
  • gulp-inline-cssstars264 - Inline your CSS properties into the style attribute in an HTML file.
  • gulp-gh-pagesstars611 - Publish contents to Github pages.
  • gulp-ng-annotatestars269 - Add AngularJS dependency injection annotations with ng-annotatestars2.1k.
  • gulp-bumpstars263 - Bump any semver JSON version.
  • gulp-file-includestars642 - Include files with gulp.
  • gulp-zipstars261 - ZIP compress files.
  • gulp-gitstars404 - Run Git commands with gulp.
  • gulp-filterstars310 - Filter files in a vinyl stream using globbing.
  • gulp-preprocess - Preprocess files based on custom context or environment configuration.
  • gulp-evalstars6 - Eval JS-expression or require CommonJS modules and JSON files.

Scaffolding

Boilerplates

  • web-starter-kitstars18.5k - Google Web Starter Kit.
  • gulp-plugin-boilerplatestars74 - Boilerplate to kickstart creating gulp plugins.
  • polymer-starter-kitstars2.5k - A starting point for Polymer 1.0 apps.
  • estestars5.5k - The most complete React/Flux dev stack and starter kit for isomorphic functional web apps.
  • mnmlstars711 - Minimal boilerplate to start a responsive HTML5/Sass project.
  • krakenstars739 - A lightweight, mobile-first boilerplate for front-end web developers.
  • angularjs-gulp-browserify-boilerplatestars1k - Boilerplate using AngularJS, Sass, gulp, and Browserify.
  • hapi-ninjastars382 - A Node.js, Hapi, and Swig boilerplate.
  • laravel-5-boilerplatestars5.1k - A Laravel 5 boilerplate project.
  • react-starterkitstars350 - React starter kit that contains react-router, Reflux, jest, webpack, gulp and Stylus.
  • gulp-frontstars241 - Frontend boilerplate and modular BEM css framework based on gulp, pug, stylus, postcss, webpack and babel.
  • Front End Starterstars20 - A boilerplate for frontend projects powered by Gulp, HTML5 bolierplate, Sass, PostCss and Webpack(for Babel transpiling).

Yeoman Generators

  • generator-gulp-webappstars3.8k - A gulp generator for modern webapps.
  • generator-gulp-angularstars3.8k - Yeoman generator for AngularJS with gulp.
  • generator-react-gulp-browserifystars421 - A Yeoman Generator for React library. It includes gulp, Browserify, Browsersync and Bootstrap.
  • generator-node-gulpstars35 - A Node.js module generator including gulp and Mocha.
  • generator-gulp-bootstrapstars69 - Yeoman generator for Bootstrap, gulp & libsass.
  • generator-angulpifystars140 - Yeoman generator involving AngularJS, gulp and Browserify.
  • generator-ionic-gulpstars136 - A Yeoman generator for Ionic Projects with gulp.
  • generator-gulp-plugin-boilerplatestars46 - Scaffold out a gulp plugin boilerplatestars74.
  • generator-jekyllizedstars332 - Jekyll workflow with gulp, Sass, AutoPrefixer, asset optimization and cache busting and much more.

Miscellaneous
